page: Microsoft Azure D2nds_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dndv6 server family. It is built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and features 2 dedicated Intel vCPUs. The hardware configuration includes 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This virtual machine runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server type is network-optimized and comes bundled with 118 GB of local storage. Additionally, the instance is premium storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance external storage volumes. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses or onboard GPU hardware.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the D2nds_v6 offers a balanced resource profile for entry-level workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources and local storage without the overhead of larger instances. It is suitable for general-purpose workloads, light database hosting, network-optimized applications, and basic web serving.
description: Microsoft Azure D2nds_v6 is a general-purpose, network-optimized virtual machine from the Dndv6 family. Powered by an Intel processor on the x86_64 architecture, it features 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and includes 118 GB of local storage, alongside premium storage capabilities for external disk integration. It does not contain a GPU or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This configuration offers a balanced resource density, making it qualitatively cost-effective for entry-level workloads that require dedicated compute resources and local disk space. The D2nds_v6 is suited for general-purpose applications, small databases, network-optimized tasks, and web serving.
